title: bidens odorata var. calcicola
intro: Bidens odorata var. calcicola, also known as the Bidens odorata calcicole or Bidens calcicola, is a rare and endemic plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The Bidens odorata var. calcicola is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be utilized to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive problems. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe and calm the body, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. Bidens odorata var. calcicola is commonly prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
